name: Hot Fudge Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the flour and baking powder.
2. Add the salt, brown sugar, and cocoa to the flour mixture.
3. Stir in the melted shortening until well combined.
4. Gradually add the hot water and milk, stirring continuously.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased 9x9-inch pan.
6. Sprinkle with additional brown sugar and cocoa on top.
7. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until set.
8. Allow to cool completely before serving.
